notes: Live portal data for Taman Nusa Puteri and nearby Rompin shows a wide spread: Taman Nusa Puteri subsales cluster around RM80k-RM160k, while nearby freehold double-storey asks in Rompin are RM140k-RM240k. Exact 2-2 1/2 storey terraced comps inside Taman Nusa Puteri were scarce, so this estimate leans on the closest terrace/double-storey comparables and adjusts for the subject’s smaller 721 sqft built-up and freehold tenure. PSF quoted here is on a land-area basis; implied land PSF is about RM135 (and roughly RM201 psf on built-up).
